chapter_title.en: The Reward of Helping a Believer, Relieving Him of Distress And Showing Him Kindness

text: وقال أبو عبد الله عليه السلام: لقضاء حاجة المؤمن خير من عتق ألف نسمة، ومن حملان ألف فرس في سبيل الله

en.muhajir-b-ali: 117. Abu 'Abd Allah (a.s) also said: Fulfilling the need of a believer is better than freeing one thousand slaves and better than providing one thousand horses in the way of Allah.
